channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 59/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 59/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 10.5%.

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Police officer received death threats over Nowak murder case as Mahmood condemns ‘dangerous’ commentary – UK politics live
item.description: Police officer received death threats over Nowak murder case as Mahmood condemns ‘dangerous’ commentary – UK politics live

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Politics latest: Starmer says he ‘felt sick’ watching ‘harrowing’ bodycam footage in Henry Nowak murder case
item.description: Politics latest: Starmer says he ‘felt sick’ watching ‘harrowing’ bodycam footage in Henry Nowak murder case

item.title: Novara Media: Conspiracy Theories, Recriminations and Insults Fly As the Far Right Melts Down Over Makerfield
item.description: Conspiracy Theories, Recriminations and Insults Fly As the Far Right Melts Down Over Makerfield

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Streeting says raising concerns over Gaza in government like ‘hitting up against a brick wall’
item.description: Streeting says raising concerns over Gaza in government like ‘hitting up against a brick wall’

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Starmer uses disappearing messages on WhatsApp, No 10 admits after Mandelson files released
item.description: Starmer uses disappearing messages on WhatsApp, No 10 admits after Mandelson files released

item.title: The Guardian: Keir Starmer - The Guardian
Guardian (Open Platform): No 10 confirms Starmer’s WhatsApp messages automatically delete
item.description: No 10 confirms Starmer’s WhatsApp messages automatically delete

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Labour figures who wrote competing ‘manifestos’ join forces to warn against tribalism

item.description: Union Members Are Abandoning Labour and Flocking to Reform

item.title: Byline Times: Peter Mandelson, The New Statesman and How the 'Soft PR' Sausage Gets Made
